---
title: Lab Members
toc: false
---


<div class="alumni-banner">
<h3>Meet Our Extended Family</h3>
<p>14 current researchers to 50+ global alumni making impact worldwide</p>
<a href="alumni.qmd" class="alumni-btn">Meet Our 50+ Alumni</a>
<a href="experiences.qmd" class="alumni-btn">Read Their Stories</a>
</div>

## Faculty

<div class="faculty-section">
<div class="faculty-image">
<a href="https://nipunbatra.github.io">
<img src="https://nipunbatra.github.io/images/nipun.jpg" class="cropped-image" alt="Prof Nipun Batra">
</a>
</div>
<div class="faculty-content">
<h3>Prof. Nipun Batra</h3>
<div class="research-keywords">Machine Learning • Sensing Technologies • Computational Sustainability</div>
<p>Nipun Batra is an Associate Professor of Computer Science at IIT Gandhinagar. He completed his postdoctoral research at the University of Virginia and earned his PhD from IIIT Delhi. His research group focuses on utilizing machine learning and sensing technologies to address computational sustainability challenges, particularly in smart buildings, air quality, and healthcare.</p>
</div>
</div>

## PhD 

::: {layout-ncol=4}

<a href="https://rishabh-mondal.github.io">
  <img src="https://rishabh-mondal.github.io/profile.jpeg" class="cropped-image"><br/>
</a>
<span>Rishabh Mondal<br/>(Jun 2023 - present)<br/><em style="color: #334155; font-size: 0.85rem;">Computer Vision • Earth Observations</em></span>

<a href="https://ayushshrivstava.github.io/">
  <img src="images/members/Ayush.jpg" class="cropped-image"><br/>
</a>
<span>Ayush Srivastava<br/>(Jul 2024 - present)<br/><em style="color: #334155; font-size: 0.85rem;">Health Sensing • Respiratory Monitoring</em></span>

<a href="">
  <img src="images/members/Ujjwal.jpg" class="cropped-image"><br/>
</a>
<span>Ujjwal K. Gupta<br/>(Jul 2024 - present)<br/><em style="color: #334155; font-size: 0.85rem;">Satellite Data • Machine Learning</em></span>

:::

## MTech

::: {layout-ncol=4}


<img src="images/members/Abhay.jpg" class="cropped-image"><br/>
<span>Abhay Pisharodi<br/>(Jul 2024 - present)<br/><em style="color: #334155; font-size: 0.85rem;">LLMs • Reasoning • Air Quality</em></span>

<img src="images/members/Abhyudaya.jpg" class="cropped-image"><br/>
<span>Abhyudaya Nair<br/>(Jul 2024 - present)<br/><em style="color: #334155; font-size: 0.85rem;">Health Sensing • Respiratory Monitoring</em></span>

<img src="images/members/Diya.png" class="cropped-image"><br/>
<span>Diya Thakor<br/>(Jul 2024 - present)<br/><em style="color: #334155; font-size: 0.85rem;">LLMs • Air Quality</em></span>

<img src="images/members/Vinayak.jpg" class="cropped-image"><br/>
<span>Vinayak Rana<br/>(Jul 2024 - present)<br/><em style="color: #334155; font-size: 0.85rem;">Air Quality • Active Learning</em></span>

<img src="images/members/Suruchi.jpg" class="cropped-image"><br/>
<span>Suruchi Hardaha<br/>(Jul 2024 - present)<br/><em style="color: #334155; font-size: 0.85rem;">Computer Vision • Self-Supervised Learning</em></span>

<img src="images/members/Parv.jpg" class="cropped-image"><br/>
<span>Parv Thecker<br/>(Jul 2025 - present)<br/><em style="color: #334155; font-size: 0.85rem;">Healthcare • IoT • Computer Vision</em></span>

<img src="images/members/Balbir.jpg" class="cropped-image"><br/>
<span>Balbir Prasad<br/>(Jul 2025 - present)<br/><em style="color: #334155; font-size: 0.85rem;">Physics Informed ML • AI weather forecasting</em></span>

<img src="images/members/Hemani.jpg" class="cropped-image"><br/>
<span>Hemani Tekwani<br/>(Jul 2025 - present)<br/><em style="color: #334155; font-size: 0.85rem;">Computer Vision • GeoAI</em></span>

<img src="images/members/Saaransh.jpg" class="cropped-image"><br/>
<span>Saaransh Shandilya<br/>(Jul 2025 - present)<br/><em style="color: #334155; font-size: 0.85rem;">Natural Language Processing • LLMs</em></span>

<img src="images/members/Zayed.jpg" class="cropped-image"><br/>
<span>Zayed Mudassir<br/>(Jul 2025 - present)<br/><em style="color: #334155; font-size: 0.85rem;">VLM • Computer Vision</em></span>
:::

## Research Fellows

::: {layout-ncol=4}
<a href="">
  <img src="images/members/Kirtan.jpg" class="cropped-image"><br/>
</a>
<span>Kirtan Gangani<br/>(Aug 2025 - present)<br/><em style="color: #334155; font-size: 0.85rem;">Smart Energy • Time-Series Analysis</em></span>

<img src="images/members/deena.jpg" class="cropped-image"><br/>
<span>Deena Lad<br/>(Sep 2025 - present)<br/><em style="color: #334155; font-size: 0.85rem;">Environmental Modelling • Research Methods</em></span>

<img src="images/members/Vaibhavi.jpg" class="cropped-image"><br/>
<span>Vaibhavi Tiwari<br/>(Feb 2026 - present)<br/><em style="color: #334155; font-size: 0.85rem;">AI • Machine Learning</em></span>
:::

<div class="compact-section">
<h3>📸 Our Journey Together</h3>
<p>Explore our lab's journey through years of collaboration, celebrations, and milestones. From research breakthroughs to graduation dinners, conference presentations to award ceremonies.</p>
<a href="memories.qmd" class="hero-btn primary">View All Memories</a>
</div>

<div class="members-join-section">
<h3>🚀 Want to Join Our Team?</h3>
<p>We are always looking for passionate researchers to join our mission of creating a sustainable future through AI and technology.</p>
<a href="openings.qmd" class="join-btn">View Open Positions</a>
<a href="lab_culture.qmd" class="join-btn" style="background: transparent; color: #2563eb; border: 2px solid #2563eb;">Learn About Our Culture</a>
</div>
